Components / Others

Noty

A dependency-free notification library. The Voyadores theme adds brand-aligned styles for success, error, warning, info, and confirmation toasts.

Setup

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.voyadores.com/content/css/noty/noty.min.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.voyadores.com/content/css/noty/noty.voyadores.min.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.voyadores.com/content/css/noty/animate.min.css" />

<script src="https://cdn.voyadores.com/content/js/jquery/jquery-3.6.0.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.voyadores.com/content/js/noty/2.3.8/packaged/jquery.noty.packaged.min.js"></script>

Demo

Click a button to trigger a notification.

Usage

// Basic notification
noty({
  text: 'Operation completed successfully.',
  type: 'success',    // success | error | warning | info
  layout: 'topRight', // topRight | topCenter | bottomRight | center
  timeout: 3000,
  animation: {
    open:  'animated fadeInRight',
    close: 'animated fadeOutRight',
    easing: 'swing',
    speed: 500,
  },
});

// Confirmation dialog
noty({
  text: 'Are you sure you want to delete this?',
  type: 'confirm',
  layout: 'center',
  buttons: [
    { addClass: 'btn btn-danger', text: 'Delete', onClick: function (n) { n.close(); } },
    { addClass: 'btn btn-secondary', text: 'Cancel', onClick: function (n) { n.close(); } },
  ],
});
On this page
